description: Spring REST controller delegating to SearchService which transitively calls Log4j logger.info() with user input, triggering CVE-2021-44228 Log4Shell JNDI injection.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: App.java calls service.search(query) which calls logger.info() in SearchService.java with user-supplied input

findings.human_justification: logger.info() is called in SearchService.search() which is invoked from the /search REST endpoint. The vulnerable function is transitively reachable with user-controlled input.
